heading: Burst Reporting
body:
Many metrics have a burst reporting equivalent. The value of a burst
reporting metric at a given granularity is the maximum reported value
from all the reports Atlas generates at the next finer granularity
level during that interval.

> **Example:** The Disk IOPS metric has a Max Disk IOPS equivalent. Atlas
> reports the Max Disk IOPS for a 1-hour interval as the highest Max
> Disk IOPS value across the 60 1-minute reports Atlas generated
> in that hour. Atlas reports the Max Disk IOPS for a 1-day
> interval as the highest Max Disk IOPS value across the 24 1-hour
> reports Atlas generated in that hour.
